resources.string: BlinkCard scan failed: activity intent extras are missing. Ensure VGSBlinkCardIntentBuilder is used to start the scan.
BlinkCard scan failed: BlinkCardScanActivitySettings not provided. Call setCardScanActivitySettings() on VGSBlinkCardIntentBuilder before launching.
BlinkCard scan completed but no card data could be read. The scanned card may not have been recognised correctly.
BlinkCard SDK failed to initialise. Verify that the license key in BlinkCardSdkSettings is valid and not expired.
